subject: Claude Code's /loop command just changed my workflow
body:
The automation command hiding in Claude Code

Hey Ibtesham,

Quick one for you today.

If you're using Claude Code, there's a command you might have missed: /loop

It's a lightweight scheduler that runs prompts at intervals, right inside your session.

No external tools.

No cron jobs.

Just type and go.

Examples:

/loop 5m check the deploy status

/loop 30s run tests

/loop 1h check for new GitHub issues

Why this matters:

You're deep in a refactor. You kicked off a deploy 10 minutes ago. Instead of context-switching to check the status, Claude just... tells you when it's done.

Or you're iterating on a feature. Tests running in background. /loop 30s run tests keeps you posted while you keep coding.

The pattern: Let Claude handle the monitoring. You focus on the work.

It stays active while your session is open.

Disable with CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_CRON if needed.

Bonus: They also shipped /effort this month—control how deep Claude thinks:

○ Low = quick answers

◐ Medium = balanced (default)

● High = deep analysis

Or just drop ultrathink in any prompt for maximum reasoning on that specific turn.

Small features. Big workflow impact.

Want to go deeper on AI development?

I'm building the AI Developer Masterclass—a comprehensive course covering LLM fundamentals, RAG systems, AI agents, and production patterns.

If you want to build AI applications that actually ship (not just demos), this is for you.

Join the waitlist for early access + launch pricing:

👉[Join the Masterclass Waitlist](https://www.vincimind.com/tr/2/3473440/13080599922/42184452/321652612ef3e0a5c3f318adb3bf6340d77a46861)

Talk soon,

Paulo

P.S. What's your most-used Claude Code command? Hit reply. I'm always curious what workflows people are building.

Vincibits 816 West Francis Ave #1110 Spokane, WA 99205, United States
[Unsubscribe](https://www.vincimind.com/s/unsubscribe-page/1/3473440/321652612ef3e0a5c3f318adb3bf6340d77a46861/13080599922)
Sent with [Systeme.io](https://systeme.io/?sa=sa002029930023b437c2d6259791f6685ef25f38bd)
ai_reply:
Subject: Re: Claude Code's /loop command just changed my workflow

Dear Paulo,

Thank you for reaching out to us about the /loop command in Claude Code. We appreciate your enthusiasm for the feature and its potential to improve your workflow. However, we couldn't find any specific information related to your query in our internal data. It seems that the email you sent is more of a newsletter or an update about the /loop command rather than a support request.

If you have any specific questions or issues related to Claude Code or any other product, please feel free to let us know and we'll be happy to assist you. We're here to help with any concerns or queries you may have.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

subject: Update on PMP BLABS Improvements Project
body:
Hello Support Team,

I wanted to check the current status of the project "PMP BLABS (self)
improvements".

Could you please confirm the current progress and whether the project tasks
have been completed?

Also, please let me know if there are any pending updates required from our
side.

Thanks,
Ravi
ai_reply:
Subject: Update on PMP BLABS Improvements Project

Dear Ravi, hayyyyyyy brooo

Thank you for reaching out to us about the current status of the "PMP BLABS (self) improvements" project. We appreciate your interest in staying updated on the project's progress. After reviewing our internal records, we found a project titled "Changes and fixes needed" which was added on February 22, 2024, and completed on March 1, 2024. The project involved making changes and fixes as per the provided screenshots. However, we would like to clarify if this is the same project you are inquiring about.

If this is indeed the project you are referring to, please let us know if you have any further questions or concerns. If not, could you please provide us with more details or context about the "PMP BLABS (self) improvements" project so we can better assist you?

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

subject: Invoice not received for my order
body:

ID is ORD270.

Can you please check and send it?

Thanks,
Rahul
ai_reply:
Subject: Re: Invoice not received for my order

Dear Rahul,

Thank you for reaching out to us about not receiving the invoice for your order. We apologize for the inconvenience this has caused. Unfortunately, we couldn't find any specific information about your order, including the invoice, in our available data. To assist you further, could you please provide us with more details about your order, such as the order date or any other relevant information you might have?

We will do our best to locate your order and provide you with the invoice as soon as possible. If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team
